name: Rachel
history: Rachel has recurring relationship problems with her husband Ivan. Work-related stress. Sister Emma often takes a caring role toward Rachel. Father had a successful career and strong work ethic, influencing Rachel's expectations. Recently laid off and currently looking for new employment.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't keep everything under control, things will fall apart.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must avoid feeling vulnerable or powerless.
coping_strategies: Rachel tries to distract herself from feelings towards Ivan by focusing on therapy sessions and routines.
situation: Received a job rejection email while searching for work.
auto_thought: If I don't close up everything now, I'll get all tied up in knots.
behavior: Rachel attempts to control her environment and emotions to avoid feeling vulnerable.
